short: Cutting logo churn from 9% to 6% looks like a win, but if your net MRR churn stays at 8% you haven’t added a single week of runway. Track logo, gross and net churn together—or you’re just slowing the bleed. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/are-reduce-saas-churn-rate-or-not
title: Are You Actually Reducing SaaS Churn Rate, or Not? A Bootstrapped Founder’s Diagnostic
